sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60674" key="kuknoka/nqaros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυκνο-κάνθᾰρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of ship <sense id="n60674.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">between</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κύκνος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">and</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κάνθαρος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0484.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
